title: DataSet Jaeger et al. 2018 Avian cholera outbreaks threaten seabird species on Amsterdam Island
author: Jaeger Audrey
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Results of PCR detection of  Pasteurella multocida  and  Erysipelothrix   rhusiopathiae  in biological material collected from five seabird species breeding on Amsterdam Island between November 2011 and January 2012. 

 Species; YNA: yellow-nosed albatross, SA: sooty albatross, NRP: northern rockhopper penguin, AA: Amsterdam albatross, BS: Brown skua 

 PM:  Pasteurella multocida  

 ER:  Erysipelothrix rhusiopathiae
